apis.name: largestIndexOfOne
apis.source_signature: function method largestIndexOfOne(l : seq<bool>) : nat requires |l| == BITS_PER_BYTE == 8 requires exists i: nat | 0 <= i < |l| :: l[i] ensures 0 <= largestIndexOfOne(l) < |l| ensures l[largestIndexOfOne(l)] == true ensures forall i : nat | largestIndexOfOne(l) < i < |l| :: l[i] == false {

apis.name: fromBitlistToBytes
apis.source_signature: function method fromBitlistToBytes(l : seq<bool>) : seq<byte> ensures | fromBitlistToBytes(l) | == ceil( |l| + 1, BITS_PER_BYTE) ensures fromBitlistToBytes(l)[|fromBitlistToBytes(l)| - 1] >= 1 decreases l {

apis.name: fromBytesToBitList
apis.source_signature: function method fromBytesToBitList(xb : seq<byte>) : seq<bool> requires |xb| >= 1 requires xb[|xb| - 1] >= 1 ensures BITS_PER_BYTE * (|xb| - 1) >= 0 ensures BITS_PER_BYTE * (|xb| - 1) <= |fromBytesToBitList(xb)| <= BITS_PER_BYTE * |xb| decreases xb {

specs.name: spec_bitlistDecodeEncodeIsIdentity
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitList (impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes l) = l
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction l} bitlistDecodeEncodeIsIdentity(l : seq<bool>)

specs.name: spec_bitlistEncodeDecodeIsIdentity
specs.lean_form: ∀ (xb : List UInt8), 0 < xb.length → 1 ≤ (xb.getD (xb.length - 1) 0).toNat → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes (impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitList xb) = xb
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction xb} bitlistEncodeDecodeIsIdentity(xb: seq<byte>)

specs.name: spec_bitlistSerialiseIsInjective
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l1 : List Bool) (l2 : List Bool), impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes l1 = impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes l2 → l1 = l2
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction l1, l2} bitlistSerialiseIsInjective(l1: seq<bool>, l2 : seq<bool>)

specs.name: spec_bitlistDeserialiseIsInjective
specs.lean_form: ∀ (xa : List UInt8) (xb : List UInt8), 0 < xa.length → 1 ≤ (xa.getD (xa.length - 1) 0).toNat → 0 < xb.length → 1 ≤ (xb.getD (xb.length - 1) 0).toNat → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitList xa = impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitList xb → xa = xb
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction xa, xb} bitlistDeserialiseIsInjective(xa: seq<byte>, xb : seq<byte>)

specs.name: spec_simplifyFromByteToListFirstArg
specs.lean_form: ∀ (b : UInt8) (m : List UInt8), 0 < m.length → 1 ≤ (m.getD (m.length - 1) 0).toNat → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitList (b :: m) = impl.eth2Dafny.byteTo8Bits b ++ impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitList m
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction m} simplifyFromByteToListFirstArg(b : byte, m : seq<byte>)

specs.name: spec_simplifyFromBitListToByteFirstArg
specs.lean_form: ∀ (e : UInt8) (xl : List Bool), impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes (impl.eth2Dafny.byteTo8Bits e ++ xl) = e :: impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes xl
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction xl} simplifyFromBitListToByteFirstArg(e: byte, xl : seq<bool>)

specs.name: spec_surjective
specs.lean_form: ∀ (xb : List UInt8), 0 < xb.length → 1 ≤ (xb.getD (xb.length - 1) 0).toNat → ∃ l : List Bool, xb = impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitlistToBytes l
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction xb} surjective(xb : seq<byte>)

specs.name: spec_largestIndexOfOne_bounds
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), l.length = 8 → (∃ b, b ∈ l ∧ b = true) → impl.eth2Dafny.largestIndexOfOne l < l.length
specs.source_signature: function method largestIndexOfOne(l : seq<bool>) : nat requires |l| == BITS_PER_BYTE == 8 requires exists i: nat | 0 <= i < |l| :: l[i] ensures 0 <= largestIndexOfOne(l) < |l| ensures l[largestIndexOfOne(l)] == true ensures forall i : nat | largestIndexOfOne(l) < i < |l| :: l[i] == false {

specs.name: spec_largestIndexOfOne_points_to_true
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), l.length = 8 → (∃ b, b ∈ l ∧ b = true) → l.getD (impl.eth2Dafny.largestIndexOfOne l) false = true
specs.source_signature: function method largestIndexOfOne(l : seq<bool>) : nat requires |l| == BITS_PER_BYTE == 8 requires exists i: nat | 0 <= i < |l| :: l[i] ensures 0 <= largestIndexOfOne(l) < |l| ensures l[largestIndexOfOne(l)] == true ensures forall i : nat | largestIndexOfOne(l) < i < |l| :: l[i] == false {

specs.name: spec_largestIndexOfOne_last_true
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool) (i : Nat), l.length = 8 → impl.eth2Dafny.largestIndexOfOne l < i → i < l.length → l.getD i false = false
specs.source_signature: function method largestIndexOfOne(l : seq<bool>) : nat requires |l| == BITS_PER_BYTE == 8 requires exists i: nat | 0 <= i < |l| :: l[i] ensures 0 <= largestIndexOfOne(l) < |l| ensures l[largestIndexOfOne(l)] == true ensures forall i : nat | largestIndexOfOne(l) < i < |l| :: l[i] == false {

apis.name: fromBytesToBitVector
apis.source_signature: function method fromBytesToBitVector(xb : seq<byte>, len: nat) : seq<bool> requires isValidBitVectorEncoding(xb,len) ensures |fromBytesToBitVector(xb,len)| == len decreases xb {

specs.name: spec_bitvectorDecodeEncodeIsIdentity
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), 0 < l.length → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitVector (impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitvectorToBytes l) l.length = l
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction l} bitvectorDecodeEncodeIsIdentity(l : seq<bool>)

specs.name: spec_bitvectorEncodeDecodeIsIdentity
specs.lean_form: ∀ (xb : List UInt8) (len : Nat), Eth20Dafny.isValidBitVectorEncoding xb len → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitvectorToBytes (impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitVector xb len) = xb
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction xb} bitvectorEncodeDecodeIsIdentity(xb: seq<byte>, len:nat)

specs.name: spec_bitvectorSerialiseIsInjectiveGeneral
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l1 : List Bool) (l2 : List Bool), l1.length = l2.length → 0 < l1.length → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitvectorToBytes l1 = impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitvectorToBytes l2 → l1 = l2
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction false} bitvectorSerialiseIsInjectiveGeneral(l1: seq<bool>, l2 : seq<bool>)

specs.name: spec_bitvectorDeserialiseIsInjective
specs.lean_form: ∀ (xa : List UInt8) (xb : List UInt8) (lena : Nat) (lenb : Nat), Eth20Dafny.isValidBitVectorEncoding xa lena → Eth20Dafny.isValidBitVectorEncoding xb lenb → impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitVector xa lena = impl.eth2Dafny.fromBytesToBitVector xb lenb → xa = xb
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction xa, xb} bitvectorDeserialiseIsInjective(xa: seq<byte>, xb : seq<byte>, lena: nat, lenb: nat)

apis.name: boolToBytes
apis.source_signature: function method boolToBytes(b: bool) : seq<byte> ensures | boolToBytes(b) | == 1 {

apis.name: boolSeDesByteToBool
apis.source_signature: function method byteToBool(xb: seq<byte>) : bool requires |xb| == 1 requires 0 <= xb[0] <= 1 {

specs.name: spec_boolToBytes_length
specs.lean_form: ∀ (b : Bool), (impl.eth2Dafny.boolToBytes b).length = 1
specs.source_signature: function method boolToBytes(b: bool) : seq<byte> ensures | boolToBytes(b) | == 1 {

specs.name: spec_boolToBytes_value
specs.lean_form: ∀ (b : Bool), impl.eth2Dafny.boolToBytes b = [impl.eth2Dafny.boolToByte b]
specs.source_signature: function method boolToBytes(b: bool) : seq<byte> ensures | boolToBytes(b) | == 1 {

specs.name: spec_boolSeDesByteToBool_canonical
specs.lean_form: ∀ (b : UInt8), b.toNat ≤ 1 → impl.eth2Dafny.boolSeDesByteToBool [b] = impl.eth2Dafny.bytesAndBitsByteToBool b
specs.source_signature: function method byteToBool(xb: seq<byte>) : bool requires |xb| == 1 requires 0 <= xb[0] <= 1 {

specs.name: spec_boolSeDes_roundtrip
specs.lean_form: ∀ (b : Bool), impl.eth2Dafny.boolSeDesByteToBool (impl.eth2Dafny.boolToBytes b) = b
specs.source_signature: function method byteToBool(xb: seq<byte>) : bool requires |xb| == 1 requires 0 <= xb[0] <= 1 {

apis.name: boolToByte
apis.source_signature: function method boolToByte(b : bool) : byte ensures 0 <= boolToByte(b) <= 1 {

apis.name: bytesAndBitsByteToBool
apis.source_signature: function method byteToBool(b : byte) : bool requires 0 <= b <= 1 {

apis.name: list8BitsToByte
apis.source_signature: function method list8BitsToByte(l : seq<bool>) : byte requires |l| == 8 == BITS_PER_BYTE ensures isNull(l) <==> list8BitsToByte(l) == 0 {

apis.name: byteTo8Bits
apis.source_signature: function method byteTo8Bits( n : byte ) : seq<bool> ensures | byteTo8Bits(n) | == 8 == BITS_PER_BYTE {

apis.name: fromBitsToBytes
apis.source_signature: function method fromBitsToBytes(l : seq<bool>) : seq<byte> ensures | fromBitsToBytes(l) | == ceil( |l|, BITS_PER_BYTE) ensures |l| >= 1 && l[|l| - 1] ==> fromBitsToBytes(l)[|fromBitsToBytes(l)| - 1] >= 1 decreases l {

specs.name: spec_encodeOfDecodeByteIsIdentity
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : UInt8), impl.eth2Dafny.list8BitsToByte (impl.eth2Dafny.byteTo8Bits n) = n
specs.source_signature: lemma encodeOfDecodeByteIsIdentity(n: byte) ensures list8BitsToByte(byteTo8Bits(n)) == n {

specs.name: spec_lemmaBoolToByteIsTheInverseOfByteToBool
specs.lean_form: ∀ (b : UInt8), b.toNat ≤ 1 → impl.eth2Dafny.boolToByte (impl.eth2Dafny.bytesAndBitsByteToBool b) = b
specs.source_signature: lemma lemmaBoolToByteIsTheInverseOfByteToBool() ensures forall b | 0 <= b <= 1 :: boolToByte(byteToBool(b)) == b;

specs.name: spec_decodeOfEncode8BitsIsIdentity
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), l.length = 8 → impl.eth2Dafny.byteTo8Bits (impl.eth2Dafny.list8BitsToByte l) = l
specs.source_signature: lemma decodeOfEncode8BitsIsIdentity(l : seq<bool>) requires |l| == 8 == BITS_PER_BYTE ensures byteTo8Bits(list8BitsToByte(l)) == l { // Thanks Dafny.

specs.name: spec_byteIsZeroIffBinaryIsNull
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : UInt8), n = 0 ↔ Eth20Dafny.isNull (impl.eth2Dafny.byteTo8Bits n)
specs.source_signature: lemma byteIsZeroIffBinaryIsNull(n : byte) ensures n == 0 <==> isNull(byteTo8Bits(n)) {

specs.name: spec_fromBitsToBytes_length
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), (impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitsToBytes l).length = Eth20Dafny.ceil l.length 8
specs.source_signature: function method fromBitsToBytes(l : seq<bool>) : seq<byte> ensures | fromBitsToBytes(l) | == ceil( |l|, BITS_PER_BYTE) ensures |l| >= 1 && l[|l| - 1] ==> fromBitsToBytes(l)[|fromBitsToBytes(l)| - 1] >= 1 decreases l {

specs.name: spec_fromBitsToBytes_last_nonzero
specs.lean_form: ∀ (l : List Bool), 0 < l.length → l.getD (l.length - 1) false = true → 1 ≤ ((impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitsToBytes l).getD ((impl.eth2Dafny.fromBitsToBytes l).length - 1) 0).toNat
specs.source_signature: function method fromBitsToBytes(l : seq<bool>) : seq<byte> ensures | fromBitsToBytes(l) | == ceil( |l|, BITS_PER_BYTE) ensures |l| >= 1 && l[|l| - 1] ==> fromBitsToBytes(l)[|fromBitsToBytes(l)| - 1] >= 1 decreases l {

apis.name: uintSe
apis.source_signature: function method uintSe(n: nat, k: nat) : seq<byte> requires k >= 1 requires n < power2(8 * k) ensures |uintSe(n, k)| == k decreases n, k {

apis.name: uintDes
apis.source_signature: function method uintDes(b : seq<byte>) : nat requires |b| >= 1 ensures uintDes(b) < power2(8 * |b|) decreases b {

specs.name: spec_involution
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat) (k : Nat), 1 ≤ k → n < Eth20Dafny.power2 (8 * k) → impl.eth2Dafny.uintDes (impl.eth2Dafny.uintSe n k) = n
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction n, k} involution(n : nat, k : nat)

apis.name: sizeOf
apis.source_signature: function method sizeOf(s: Serialisable): nat requires isBasicTipe(typeOf(s)) ensures 1 <= sizeOf(s) <= 32 && sizeOf(s) == |serialise(s)| {

apis.name: default
apis.source_signature: function method default(t : Tipe) : Serialisable requires !(t.Container_? || t.List_? || t.Vector_?) requires t.Bytes_? || t.Bitvector_? ==> match t

apis.name: serialise
apis.source_signature: function method serialise(s : Serialisable) : seq<byte> requires typeOf(s) != Container_ requires s.List? ==> match s case List(_,t,_) => isBasicTipe(t) requires s.Vector? ==> match s case Vector(v) => isBasicTipe(typeOf(v[0])) decreases s {

apis.name: serialiseSeqOfBasics
apis.source_signature: function method serialiseSeqOfBasics(s: seq<Serialisable>): seq<byte> requires forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: isBasicTipe(typeOf(s[i])) requires forall i,j | 0 <= i < |s| && 0 <= j < |s| :: typeOf(s[i]) == typeOf(s[j]) ensures |s| == 0 ==> |serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == 0 ensures |s| > 0 ==>|serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == |s| * |serialise(s[0])| decreases s {

apis.name: deserialise
apis.source_signature: function method deserialise(xs : seq<byte>, s : Tipe) : Try<Serialisable> requires !(s.Container_? || s.List_? || s.Vector_?) ensures match deserialise(xs, s) case Success(r) => wellTyped(r)

specs.name: spec_wellTypedDoesNotFail
specs.lean_form: ∀ (s : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable), Eth20Dafny.wellTyped s → impl.eth2Dafny.deserialise (impl.eth2Dafny.serialise s) (Eth20Dafny.typeOf s) ≠ Eth20Dafny.Try.Failure
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction s} wellTypedDoesNotFail(s : Serialisable)

specs.name: spec_seDesInvolutive
specs.lean_form: ∀ (s : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable), Eth20Dafny.wellTyped s → impl.eth2Dafny.deserialise (impl.eth2Dafny.serialise s) (Eth20Dafny.typeOf s) = Eth20Dafny.Try.Success s
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction s} seDesInvolutive(s : Serialisable)

specs.name: spec_serialiseIsInjective
specs.lean_form: ∀ (s1 : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable) (s2 : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable), Eth20Dafny.typeOf s1 = Eth20Dafny.typeOf s2 → impl.eth2Dafny.serialise s1 = impl.eth2Dafny.serialise s2 → s1 = s2
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction s1, s2} serialiseIsInjective(s1: Serialisable, s2 : Serialisable)

specs.name: spec_sizeOf_basic_bounds_and_length
specs.lean_form: ∀ (s : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable), Eth20Dafny.isBasicTipe (Eth20Dafny.typeOf s) → 1 ≤ impl.eth2Dafny.sizeOf s ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.sizeOf s ≤ 32 ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.sizeOf s = (impl.eth2Dafny.serialise s).length
specs.source_signature: function method sizeOf(s: Serialisable): nat requires isBasicTipe(typeOf(s)) ensures 1 <= sizeOf(s) <= 32 && sizeOf(s) == |serialise(s)| {

specs.name: spec_default_basic_values
specs.lean_form: impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Bool_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Bool false ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Uint8_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Uint8 0 ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Uint16_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Uint16 0 ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Uint32_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Uint32 0 ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Uint64_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Uint64 0 ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Uint128_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Uint128 0 ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Uint256_ = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Uint256 0
specs.source_signature: function method default(t : Tipe) : Serialisable requires !(t.Container_? || t.List_? || t.Vector_?) requires t.Bytes_? || t.Bitvector_? ==> match t

specs.name: spec_default_collection_values
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat), impl.eth2Dafny.default (Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Bitvector_ n) = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Bitvector (Eth20Dafny.timeSeq false n) ∧ impl.eth2Dafny.default (Eth20Dafny.Tipe.Bytes_ n) = Eth20Dafny.RawSerialisable.Bytes (Eth20Dafny.timeSeq 0 n)
specs.source_signature: function method default(t : Tipe) : Serialisable requires !(t.Container_? || t.List_? || t.Vector_?) requires t.Bytes_? || t.Bitvector_? ==> match t

specs.name: spec_serialiseSeqOfBasics_empty
specs.lean_form: impl.eth2Dafny.serialiseSeqOfBasics [] = []
specs.source_signature: function method serialiseSeqOfBasics(s: seq<Serialisable>): seq<byte> requires forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: isBasicTipe(typeOf(s[i])) requires forall i,j | 0 <= i < |s| && 0 <= j < |s| :: typeOf(s[i]) == typeOf(s[j]) ensures |s| == 0 ==> |serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == 0 ensures |s| > 0 ==>|serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == |s| * |serialise(s[0])| decreases s {

specs.name: spec_serialiseSeqOfBasics_cons
specs.lean_form: ∀ (x : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable) (xs : List Eth20Dafny.Serialisable), impl.eth2Dafny.serialiseSeqOfBasics (x :: xs) = impl.eth2Dafny.serialise x ++ impl.eth2Dafny.serialiseSeqOfBasics xs
specs.source_signature: function method serialiseSeqOfBasics(s: seq<Serialisable>): seq<byte> requires forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: isBasicTipe(typeOf(s[i])) requires forall i,j | 0 <= i < |s| && 0 <= j < |s| :: typeOf(s[i]) == typeOf(s[j]) ensures |s| == 0 ==> |serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == 0 ensures |s| > 0 ==>|serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == |s| * |serialise(s[0])| decreases s {

specs.name: spec_serialiseSeqOfBasics_length
specs.lean_form: ∀ (x : Eth20Dafny.Serialisable) (xs : List Eth20Dafny.Serialisable), Eth20Dafny.isBasicTipe (Eth20Dafny.typeOf x) → (∀ y, y ∈ xs → Eth20Dafny.typeOf y = Eth20Dafny.typeOf x) → (impl.eth2Dafny.serialiseSeqOfBasics (x :: xs)).length = (x :: xs).length * (impl.eth2Dafny.serialise x).length
specs.source_signature: function method serialiseSeqOfBasics(s: seq<Serialisable>): seq<byte> requires forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: isBasicTipe(typeOf(s[i])) requires forall i,j | 0 <= i < |s| && 0 <= j < |s| :: typeOf(s[i]) == typeOf(s[j]) ensures |s| == 0 ==> |serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == 0 ensures |s| > 0 ==>|serialiseSeqOfBasics(s)| == |s| * |serialise(s[0])| decreases s {

apis.name: get_next_power_of_two
apis.source_signature: function method get_next_power_of_two(n : nat) : nat requires true ensures get_next_power_of_two(n) >= 1 ensures get_next_power_of_two(n) >= n ensures n >= 1 ==> (get_next_power_of_two(n) / 2) < n decreases n {

apis.name: get_prev_power_of_two
apis.source_signature: function method get_prev_power_of_two(n : nat) : nat requires n > 0 ensures 1 <= get_prev_power_of_two(n) <= n ensures 2 * get_prev_power_of_two(n) > n decreases n {

specs.name: spec_getNextPow2isPower2
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat), ∃ k : Nat, impl.eth2Dafny.get_next_power_of_two n = Eth20Dafny.power2 k
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction n} getNextPow2isPower2(n: nat)

specs.name: spec_getPrevPow2isPower2
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat), 0 < n → ∃ k : Nat, impl.eth2Dafny.get_prev_power_of_two n = Eth20Dafny.power2 k
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction n} getPrevPow2isPower2(n: nat)

specs.name: spec_getNextPow2isIdempotent
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat), impl.eth2Dafny.get_next_power_of_two (impl.eth2Dafny.get_next_power_of_two n) = impl.eth2Dafny.get_next_power_of_two n
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction n} getNextPow2isIdempotent(n: nat)

specs.name: spec_getNextPow2LowerBound
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat), n ≤ impl.eth2Dafny.get_next_power_of_two n
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction n} getNextPow2LowerBound(n: nat)

specs.name: spec_nextPow2IsPow2
specs.lean_form: ∀ (n : Nat), Eth20Dafny.isPowerOf2 (impl.eth2Dafny.get_next_power_of_two n)
specs.source_signature: lemma {:induction n} nextPow2IsPow2(n: nat)
